name: radio-group
title: Radio Group
description: Single-select radio options with accessible keyboard navigation.
docs:
# Radio Group
Single-select radio options with accessible keyboard navigation.
## Import
```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/radio-group";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<RadioGroup value="starter" value="starter" />
```
## Props
- **value** (string) — default: `"starter"`: Selected
- **value** (string) — default: `"starter"`: Selected
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add radio-group
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/radio-group
```
